title: Flea and Tick Dog Shampoo by Bugalugs, Works on Smelly Puppies & Dogs, Contains Neem Oil PH Balanced Vegan Used by Professional Groom (Shampoo 500ml)
features: WASHES OUT FLEAS AND TICKS: Bugalugs flea and tick professional dog groom shampoo is a natural way of washing out fleas and ticks
HELPS SOOTHES PUPPY & DOG: helps calms and sooths your pet.
TRUSTED FORMULA: All Bugalugs products are only ever tested on humans, and never on animals. All of our dog grooming and dog shampoo are cruelty free, made with natural ingredients and vegan
MADE IN UK: with recycled bottles and water from The Lake District, a UNESQO World Heritage site
description: Product Description Bugalugs Pet Care prides itself on manufacturing, vegan & cruelty pet care products for dogs. Our range of pH balanced dog shampoos have been carefully designed using natural ingredients and irresistible fragrances. Our unique formulas are expertly created to ensure every dog receives the best grooming care possible. Flea & Tick Dog Shampoo by Bugalugs Pet Care Bugalugs Flea & Tick Shampoo is specially formulated to effectively wash out flea, ticks and other unwanted pests in your dog's coat. Infused with key natural ingredients such as neem oil, Lavdin and eucalyptus to gently soothe and relief irritated and bitten skin from nose to tail. Our bug banishing formula is designed using neem oil, a natural ingredient with insect repelling properties. Swiftly wash away nasty pests, whilst removing dirt and odours with this gentle pH balanced Dog Shampoo. Wash Away Fleas, Ticks & Unwanted Pests Deep Cleansing Formula pH Balanced & Gentle With Neem, Lavadin & Eucalyptus Oil Vegan & Cruelty Free Made in the UK's Lake District Baby Fresh Dog Shampoo Luxury 2 in 1 Dog Shampoo + Conditioner Flea & Tick Dog Shampoo Oatmeal Dog Shampoo Lavender & Chamomile 4 in 1 Dog Shampoo Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 11,812 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,676 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,437 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,286 4.7 out of 5 stars 788 Price £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 — no data — no data Description Cleanse & soften your own fur baby's coat with this gentle pH balanced dog shampoo. Infused with the comforting scent of baby powder, Bugalugs Bestselling Baby Fresh Shampoo provides your pup with a well deserved pamper. Deeply nourish the dog's skin & coat with Bugalugs Luxury 2 in 1 Dog Shampoo & Conditioner. This deluxe combined formula is infused with papaya & coconut to gently cleanse and replenish the dogs skin & coat. Effectively wash away fleas, ticks and other unwanted pests with Bugalugs Flea & Tick Dog Shampoo. Formulated with neem oil, lavadin & eucalyptus to soothe bitten skin whilst swiftly removing dirt & odour. Soothe dry, irritated and cracked skin with Bugalugs Oatmeal Dog Shampoo. Infused with a refreshing coconut & lime fragrance, this deeply nourishing and soothing formula helps revitalise damaged skin whilst cleansing the coat. A gentle PH balanced 4 in 1 Dog Shampoo that calms, cleans, conditions, and moisturises. Infused with calming lavender & chamomile to help relax anxious dogs whilst soothing irritated skin. Sizes Available 250ml, 500ml, 1L & 5L 250ml, 500ml, 1L & 5L 250ml, 500ml, 1L & 5L 250ml, 500ml, 1L & 5L 250ml, 500ml, 1L & 5L Deep Cleansing Formula ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Vegan & Cruelty Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ pH Balanced & Gentle ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Infused with Natural Ingredients ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
